name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/week tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/week, inconsistent timesheet entries cause payroll errors. We notify payroll teams of missing or inconsistent entries instead of manual tracking and reconciliation of timesheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent timesheet entries lead to payroll errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent timesheet entries lead to payroll errors.
